tasks.name: Create SectionContainer component
tasks.purpose: Provide standardized section wrapper with consistent spacing, width, and background variants for all homepage sections

constraints: Must be server component by default
Background variants use CSS custom properties from F1
Follow existing containerBase pattern from page.tsx

tasks.input_state: No SectionContainer component exists. Individual sections duplicate spacing/width patterns.
tasks.output_state: SectionContainer component created with standardized spacing (py-16 md:py-24 lg:py-32), max-width (max-w-7xl), horizontal padding (px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8), mx-auto, id prop, className prop, and background variant prop ('default' | 'surface' | 'transparent').
tasks.acceptance_criterion: SectionContainer component exists, exports correctly, and has props for id, className, background, and children.

tasks.name: Define Statistics content interface and data
tasks.purpose: Provide TypeScript interface and placeholder data for the Statistics section (4 animated stat blocks)

dependencies: Spec content: 2,000+ professionals, 50,000+ presentations, 4.9/5 rating, 85% time saved
constraints: Follow existing pattern of inline interface definitions

tasks.input_state: homepage-content.config.ts exists with existing interfaces (BlogPost, StickyContentItem, FeatureCard) and section configs (hero, sticky, features, testimonials, essentialReads, pricing).
tasks.output_state: StatisticItem interface defined (value, label, suffix?, prefix?) and statisticsContent array added with 4 stat items (2,000+ professionals, 50,000+ presentations, 4.9/5 rating, 85% time saved).
tasks.acceptance_criterion: StatisticItem interface exported, statisticsContent array exists with 4 items matching spec values.
tasks.verification_command: grep 'interface StatisticItem' apps/web/config/homepage-content.config.ts && grep 'statisticsContent' apps/web/config/homepage-content.config.ts | grep -c '2,000\|50,000\|4.9' | xargs test 3 -le && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Define How It Works content interface and data

action.target: How It Works content interface and data

tasks.purpose: Provide TypeScript interface and placeholder data for the How It Works section (4-step horizontal stepper)

dependencies: Spec content: Assemble, Outline, Storyboard, Produce (4 steps with titles, descriptions, iconName)
constraints: Follow existing pattern of inline interface definitions
Use Lucide icon names matching existing FeatureCard pattern

tasks.input_state: homepage-content.config.ts has StatisticItem interface and statisticsContent data added.
tasks.output_state: HowItWorksStep interface defined (stepNumber, title, description, iconName) and howItWorksSteps array added with 4 steps (Assemble, Outline, Storyboard, Produce).
tasks.acceptance_criterion: HowItWorksStep interface exported, howItWorksSteps array exists with 4 steps matching spec names.
tasks.verification_command: grep 'interface HowItWorksStep' apps/web/config/homepage-content.config.ts && grep 'howItWorksSteps' apps/web/config/homepage-content.config.ts | grep -c 'Assemble\|Outline\|Storyboard\|Produce' | xargs test 4 -le && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Define Comparison content interface and data
tasks.purpose: Provide TypeScript interface and placeholder data for the Comparison section (Without vs With SlideHeroes)

dependencies: Spec content: comparison items with text and included boolean
constraints: Use realistic comparison text matching spec examples

tasks.input_state: homepage-content.config.ts has StatisticItem and HowItWorksStep interfaces added.
tasks.output_state: ComparisonItem interface defined (text, included) and comparisonContent object added with 'without' and 'with' arrays containing comparison items.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: ComparisonItem interface exported, comparisonContent object exists with without/with arrays.
tasks.verification_command: grep 'interface ComparisonItem' apps/web/config/homepage-content.config.ts && grep 'comparisonContent' apps/web/config/homepage-content.config.ts | grep -E 'without.*with' && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Define Final CTA content interface and data

action.target: Final CTA content interface and data

tasks.purpose: Provide TypeScript interface and placeholder data for the Final CTA section (closing conversion section)

dependencies: Spec content: headline, subheadline, primaryCta, secondaryCta, trustBadges
constraints: Nested object structure for CTA config

tasks.input_state: homepage-content.config.ts has StatisticItem, HowItWorksStep, and ComparisonItem interfaces added.
tasks.output_state: FinalCtaConfig interface defined (headline, subheadline, primaryCta, secondaryCta, trustBadges) and finalCtaContent object added with complete data.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: FinalCtaConfig interface exported, finalCtaContent object exists with headline, CTAs, and trustBadges.
tasks.verification_command: grep 'interface FinalCtaConfig' apps/web/config/homepage-content.config.ts && grep 'finalCtaContent' apps/web/config/homepage-content.config.ts | grep -E 'headline.*primaryCta.*trustBadges' && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Verify content config exports and typecheck
tasks.purpose: Ensure all new interfaces are properly exported, homepageContentConfig object includes new section data, and typecheck passes

dependencies: All 4 new interfaces (StatisticItem, HowItWorksStep, ComparisonItem, FinalCtaConfig)
All 4 new content arrays (statisticsContent, howItWorksSteps, comparisonContent, finalCtaContent)
constraints: Interfaces must be exported for use by other components
Content must be added to homepageContentConfig export object

tasks.input_state: All 4 interfaces and content arrays defined but not necessarily exported or integrated into homepageContentConfig object.
tasks.output_state: All interfaces exported, all content arrays integrated into homepageContentConfig export, pnpm typecheck passes, pnpm lint passes.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Typecheck passes, lint passes, all interfaces exported, all content accessible via homepageContentConfig.
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && grep -E 'export (interface|type) (StatisticItem|HowItWorksStep|ComparisonItem|FinalCtaConfig)' apps/web/config/homepage-content.config.ts | wc -l | xargs test 4 -le
